name: briefing-workflow
description: Test briefing skill — script awareness, SPI data sources, skip flag, agent routing, boundary with SPI status

steps.name: briefing-script-knowledge
steps.prompt: what script generates the daily briefing note and what data sources does it aggregate?

steps.name: skip-spi-flag
steps.prompt: what flag skips the SPI fork health collection for a faster briefing?

steps.name: spi-delegation
steps.prompt: if an SPI fork has a cascade-blocked issue, what agent handles that?

assertions.description: Routes SPI fork issues to the @spi agent

steps.name: briefing-vs-activity
steps.prompt: what is the difference between the briefing skill and the osdu-activity skill?

assertions.description: Distinguishes briefing as a daily aggregation vs ad-hoc status
